deployment.status: Live and operational with liquidity provision pending

GrintaHook.role: OracleRelayer - executes keeper-less TWAP reads and PID rate updates on every swap
key_functions: after_swap - fires on Grit/USDC pool swaps, updates collateral price and redemption rate
register_extension - registers extension with Ekubo Core
update - manual fallback to trigger price/rate updates

SafeManager.role: SAFE management interface - open, deposit, borrow, repay, delegate agents

SAFEEngine.role: Core ledger - SAFE storage, GRIT ERC20 token, redemption price/rate mechanism

CollateralJoin.role: WBTC custody and decimal conversion (8 -> 18 decimals)

PIDController.role: HAI-style PI controller with leaky integrator - computes redemption rate adjustments

MockUSDC.role: Quote token for GRIT/USDC trading pair on Ekubo
MockUSDC.note: Deployed as test token on Sepolia; use real USDC on mainnet

MockEkuboOracle.role: Provides BTC/USDC price feed for testing (admin-set)
MockEkuboOracle.note: Used by GrintaHook to read collateral (BTC) price

MockWBTC.role: Collateral asset - users deposit WBTC to borrow GRIT
MockWBTC.note: Deployed as test token on Sepolia; use real WBTC on mainnet

Ekubo_Core.role: DEX protocol for GRIT/USDC liquidity pool and hook execution

Ekubo_Oracle_Extension.role: Provides TWAP readings for asset price feeds

pool_configuration.liquidity_status: Pending - awaiting sncast execution of add_liquidity_sepolia.cairo

notes.keeper_less_design: The protocol is keeper-less because GrintaHook is registered as an Ekubo extension that fires after every swap. No external keepers needed - the hook automatically updates collateral prices and redemption rates based on swap activity.
notes.price_update_interval: 60 seconds - throttle for collateral price updates
notes.rate_update_interval: 3600 seconds (1 hour) - cooldown for redemption rate updates (matches PID controller integral period)
notes.next_action: Execute: sncast --profile sepolia script run add_liquidity_sepolia --package grinta_scripts
